arxiv.title: Generative Models as a Complex Systems Science: How can we make sense of large language model behavior?

arxiv.title: DiviML: A Module-based Heuristic for Mapping Neural Networks onto Heterogeneous Platforms
arxiv.abstract: Datacenters are increasingly becoming heterogeneous, and are starting to include specialized hardware for networking, video processing, and especially deep learning. arxiv.title: Performance Evaluation of Swin Vision Transformer Model using Gradient Accumulation Optimization Technique
arxiv.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a promising approach for visual recognition tasks, revolutionizing the field by leveraging the power of transformer-based architectures. arxiv.title: Multicriteria Optimization Techniques for Understanding the Case Mix Landscape of a Hospital
arxiv.abstract: Various medical and surgical units operate in a typical hospital and to treat their patients these units compete for infrastructure like operating rooms (OR) and ward beds. arxiv.title: Detecting the Anomalies in LiDAR Pointcloud
arxiv.abstract: LiDAR sensors play an important role in the perception stack of modern autonomous driving systems. Adverse weather conditions such as rain, fog and dust, as well as some (occasional) LiDAR hardware fault may cause the LiDAR to produce pointcloud with abnormal patterns such as scattered noise points

arxiv.title: Hierarchical Semi-Supervised Learning Framework for Surgical Gesture Segmentation and Recognition Based on Multi-Modality Data
arxiv.abstract: Segmenting and recognizing surgical operation trajectories into distinct, meaningful gestures is a critical preliminary step in surgical workflow analysis for robot-assisted surgery. arxiv.title: MTUncertainty: Assessing the Need for Post-editing of Machine Translation Outputs by Fine-tuning OpenAI LLMs
arxiv.abstract: Translation Quality Evaluation (TQE) is an essential step of the modern translation production process. arxiv.title: A Case for AI Safety via Law
arxiv.abstract: How to make artificial intelligence (AI) systems safe and aligned with human values is an open research question. arxiv.title: C-DARL: Contrastive diffusion adversarial representation learning for label-free blood vessel segmentation
arxiv.abstract: Blood vessel segmentation in medical imaging is one of the essential steps for vascular disease diagnosis and interventional planning in a broad spectrum of clinical scenarios in image-based medicine and interventional medicine. arxiv.title: Analytical Techniques to Support Hospital Case Mix Planning
arxiv.abstract: This article introduces analytical techniques and a decision support tool to support capacity assessment and case mix planning (CMP) approaches previously created for hospitals.
